title: OpenAI Added Models, Codex, And Managed Agents On AWS
summary: OpenAI announced limited-preview AWS availability for OpenAI models on Amazon Bedrock, Codex configured to use Bedrock as a provider, and Amazon Bedrock Managed Agents powered by OpenAI.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Verify Bedrock access, regional coverage, quotas, pricing, and governance controls before routing OpenAI model traffic through AWS.
Test Codex CLI, desktop app, and VS Code extension behavior when Bedrock is configured as the provider, including auth, billing attribution, and enterprise policy controls.
Evaluate Bedrock Managed Agents separately from direct model invocation because orchestration, tool use, governance, and metering can differ.

detail.migration_notes: This event records OpenAI-announced AWS limited-preview availability and Codex provider routing. APW does not assert Bedrock account eligibility, regional parity, or final pricing.

limitations: Limited-preview access, AWS account eligibility, regional availability, and exact Bedrock pricing require account-level verification.
No raw announcement body is copied into APW.
